DiUSB20 Driver Layer — String-Based Decompilation (2-level depth)

Generated by DecompileUSBDriver.java (Ghidra headless)

=======================================================================

KEY QUESTIONS:
1. What USB controller IP core is this? (MUSB vs DWC vs custom)
2. How many hardware endpoints exist?
3. Is isochronous transfer supported at hardware level?
4. How are endpoint types configured?

    do {
                    /* WARNING: Do nothing block with infinite loop */
    } while( true );
  }
                    /* WARNING: Could not recover jumptable at 0xff81b1e8. Too many branches */
                    /* WARNING: Treating indirect jump as call */
  (*(code *)*DAT_ff81b1f8)();
  return;
}
